#  Apache Flink CDC 3.5.0 Release Announcement
September 26, 2025 - Yanquan Lv
The Apache Flink Community is excited to announce the release of Flink CDC 3.5.0!
This release introduces new pipeline connectors for Apache Fluss and PostgreSQL…
